articles.title: Joao Pedro hat-trick as Chelsea come from behind to beat Villa
articles.summary: Joao Pedro scores a hat-trick as Chelsea come from a goal down to secure an impressive win against Aston Villa, boosting their hopes of qualifying for next season's Champions League.

articles.title: Saka scores only goal as leaders Arsenal edge past Brighton

articles.title: Summerville strike enough to give West Ham crucial win at Fulham

articles.title: 'Bitterly disappointed' - Carrick loses first match as Man Utd manager
articles.summary: Manchester United manager Michael Carrick says defeat to 10-man Newcastle "hurts a lot" and he is "bitterly disappointed" after the 2-1 loss at St James' Park in the Premier League.
